text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...All right, things are looking good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I are training for the NHK Mile
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Keep up the good work, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're in pretty good shape!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama! Inari! Are you guys training too?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, duh! Runnin' is kinda our thing!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We happened to spot ya runnin' while we were
trainin', so we thought we'd come say hi. And spy
on ya a bit while we're at it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're doing pretty amazin', as always. I bet
you'll be a real threat when we go head-to-head.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A treat?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A threat! Geez! Ya never think of nothin' but food, do ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, Oguri Cap's roommate, and Inari
One, who's in the same grade as them, are both
regarded as this year's rising stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the two are small in stature, they've
managed to come out on top in all kinds of
different races. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, whatcha gawkin' at? Bet ya were thinkin'
how tiny we both are!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whazzat?! You better keep the t-word outta your
mouth! We're not even that small!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
To be fair, though, ya are pretty tiny. Tinier than
me, at least!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Say what?! There's barely an inch between us! If
you're trying to pick a fight, I'm game!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Why are you even fighting? You're both short.
That's a matter of fact.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross and Inari One
text_block_list.text: Aargh! Ooof!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a heartwarming sight. These are three of
the year's hottest contestants, but the
atmosphere between them isn't tense in the
slightest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch them laugh and joke with each other,
until...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're all having fun. Mind if I join?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is another up-and-coming
Umamusume from the same year as the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Possessing formidable physical prowess, she's had
considerable success in long-distance races. This
has put her name on every trainer's lips.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama, Inari... even you, Trainer? How come you
guys are so quiet all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you all have a stomachache or something? Are
you okay? I can rub your bellies if you want.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's not it! It's just... you two have both been
makin' a splash recently, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
From an outsider's perspective, the two of ya are
enemies! 'Course we're gonna tense up when the
two of yous meet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Super Creek is a major contender in
the classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Depending on how well she performs in the
future, she could present a major obstacle for
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, Oguri seems like a worthy opponent
indeed. It looks like I have my work cut out for
me if I'm racing against her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh? What makes you say that?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I mean, weren't you undefeated back in
Kasamatsu? That's what I heard at least. Very
impressive. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-oh, you know about that? Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What're ya actin' all flattered for? She's clearly
tryin' to rile ya up, suggestin' you're just a nobody
here in the city!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap and Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Was she? ...Was I?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Are yous guys for real? I've never seen two rivals look less competitive!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I guess I was a little hasty in hopin' they'd break
out into a spectacular brawl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How will these two perform against one another
in a race? In order to find out, Oguri Cap will
need to keep improving her track record in mile
races!
